title: Suma Sklep
description: Suma24.pl is a Polish B2B online store specializing in professional cleaning products, catering equipment, and hygiene systems for the HoReCa (Hotel, Restaurant, Catering) and food industry sectors. It is operated by Suma Service, a family-owned company founded in 1995 and headquartered in Koszalin, Poland. The store offers 24/7 online ordering with payment via bank transfer, BLIK, and online transfers, and provides personalized offers, technical consulting, and long-term partnership programs
